'''âk-sh-r''' ('''kakashar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:negative|negative]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:negative|negative]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-sh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kakashar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikashar|thikashar]] || [[word:jikashar|jikashar]] || [[word:shikashar|shikashar]] || [[word:kikashar|kikashar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukashar|thuthukashar]] || [[word:jujukashar|jujukashar]] || [[word:shushukashar|shushukashar]] || [[word:kukukashar|kukukashar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukashar|thukashar]] || [[word:jukashar|jukashar]] || [[word:shukashar|shukashar]] || [[word:kukashar|kukashar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukashar|thukashar]] || [[word:jukashar|jukashar]] || [[word:shukashar|shukashar]] || [[word:kukashar|kukashar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekashar|thekashar]] || [[word:jekashar|jekashar]] || [[word:shekashar|shekashar]] || [[word:kekashar|kekashar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokashar|thothokashar]] || [[word:jojokashar|jojokashar]] || [[word:shoshokashar|shoshokashar]] || [[word:kokokashar|kokokashar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokashar|thokashar]] || [[word:jokashar|jokashar]] || [[word:shokashar|shokashar]] || [[word:kokashar|kokashar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokashar|thokashar]] || [[word:jokashar|jokashar]] || [[word:shokashar|shokashar]] || [[word:kokashar|kokashar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkashar|thĂŠkashar]] || [[word:jĂŠkashar|jĂŠkashar]] || [[word:shĂŠkashar|shĂŠkashar]] || [[word:kĂŠkashar|kĂŠkashar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakashar|thathakashar]] || [[word:jajakashar|jajakashar]] || [[word:shashakashar|shashakashar]] || [[word:kakakashar|kakakashar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakashar|thakashar]] || [[word:jakashar|jakashar]] || [[word:shakashar|shakashar]] || [[word:kakashar|kakashar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakashar|thakashar]] || [[word:jakashar|jakashar]] || [[word:shakashar|shakashar]] || [[word:kakashar|kakashar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakashar|shakashar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakashar|goshakashar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakashar|gokishakashar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakasharnĂŒ|shakasharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakasharnknĂŒ|goshakasharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasharnĂŒ|gokishakasharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakasharshĂ«|shakasharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakasharnkshĂ«|goshakasharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakasharshĂ«|gokishakasharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasharo|shakasharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasharnkro|goshakasharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasharo|gokishakasharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasharmu|shakasharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasharnkmu|goshakasharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasharmu|gokishakasharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakasharsher|shakasharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakasharnksher|goshakasharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakasharsher|gokishakasharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakasharng|shakasharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakasharnkng|goshakasharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakasharng|gokishakasharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakasharya|shakasharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakasharnkya|goshakasharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakasharya|gokishakasharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakasharyam|shakasharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakasharnkyam|goshakasharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakasharyam|gokishakasharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakasharnĂŒshĂ«|shakasharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakasharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakasharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakasharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakasharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasharnĂŒro|shakasharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasharnknĂŒro|goshakasharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasharnĂŒro|gokishakasharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasharnĂŒmu|shakasharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasharnknĂŒmu|goshakasharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasharnĂŒmu|gokishakasharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakasharshĂ«nĂŒ|shakasharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakasharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakasharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakasharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasharshĂ«ro|shakasharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasharnkshĂ«ro|goshakasharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasharshĂ«ro|gokishakasharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasharshĂ«mu|shakasharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasharnkshĂ«mu|goshakasharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasharshĂ«mu|gokishakasharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakasharonĂŒ|shakasharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakasharnkronĂŒ|goshakasharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasharonĂŒ|gokishakasharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakasharoshĂ«|shakasharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakasharnkroshĂ«|goshakasharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakasharoshĂ«|gokishakasharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakasharomu|shakasharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakasharnkromu|goshakasharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakasharomu|gokishakasharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakasharmunĂŒ|shakasharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakasharnkmunĂŒ|goshakasharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakasharmunĂŒ|gokishakasharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakasharmushĂ«|shakasharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakasharnkmushĂ«|goshakasharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakasharmushĂ«|gokishakasharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakasharmuro|shakasharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakasharnkmuro|goshakasharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakasharmuro|gokishakasharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
